title: BCombatLog
description: Simple combat logging plugin with actionbar countdown
body:
**BCombatLog** is a lightweight and reliable Paper/Spigot plugin that prevents players from abusing combat logging during PvP fights.

When a player damages another player, both are placed into combat for a configurable amount of time (default: 20 seconds). While in combat, players see a clear ActionBar countdown showing how many seconds remain. Logging out during combat will result in instant death, preventing unfair escapes.

Combat is automatically cleared when a player kills another player, allowing normal gameplay to resume immediately after a fight.

**✨ Features**

**20-second combat timer** (configurable)

**ActionBar countdown display**

Combat only starts on player-vs-player damage

Combat ends instantly after killing a player

Logging out during combat kills the player

**Lightweight and easy to configure**

**Compatible with Paper & Spigot (1.21+)**

**🔧 Configuration**

All settings can be adjusted in config.yml, including combat duration and ActionBar message format.

**👤 Author**

Blueberry_coww
